« ﹙! !﹚Synopsis : »

Once, by chance, Seong-je saw something that ultimately became the cause of his passionate amusement. The newbie from the Union — you, who were like the won lottery. The one who has surpassed Seong-je in physical strength, being the only one (besides Baek-jin) who can stand up to him on equal terms. Since then, your relationship has evolved, growing into.. well, something. During a rooftop fight, Seong-je manages to pin you to the ground, relishing the sight of you, his defeated opponent, and asserting his dominance through physical restraint and mockery.

𝖭𝗈𝗍𝖾𝗌 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋 — im obsessed with this guy hi ; info about tags: Seong-je probably doesn't know the limits, considers everything as a game, and, had not even a single friend in the past - so he doesn't know what it's like to have a friend, what friendship is and how to be a friend himself => he probably can treat you somehow rude and not realising that (still secretly caring abt you); can offend when he, maybe, didn't even mean it and so on. That's where we coming to "enemies to lovers". The friendship between you is unclear, vague - you're not quite friends but not enemies either, you fight each other for fun and your own reasons (perhaps a hidden competition/hostility due to how similar your physical strength is). And who knows? the scenario assumes (but does not require) the presence of feelings between you. Slow burn or something.
